basic_details.job_title: CUTN Faculty Resource Person Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.short_information: Central University of Tamil Nadu (CUTN) Faculty Resource Person (Science & Social Science) Notification 2026 has been released on the official website. A total of 01 vacancy has been announced through the CUTN Faculty Resource Person (Science & Social Science) Walk-in Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: PG / M.A. degree with minimum 60% of marks in any discipline of Science / Social Sciences disciplines, UPSC / TNPSC Group 1 (Prelims or Mains) qualified after 2015
qualification.details: PG / M.A. degree with minimum 60% of marks in any discipline of Science / Social Sciences disciplines. UPSC / TNPSC Group 1 (Prelims or Mains) qualified after 2015. Preferable: Teaching Experience in any Civil Services Coaching Institute of repute. Ability to teach CSAT (Quantitative Aptitude, Reasoning, Reading comprehension), General Science, Ethics, Law, History, Geography, Economics and other topics for Preliminary and Mains exam of UPSC / TNPSC Group 1.

content_sections.heading: CUTN Faculty Resource Person (Science & Social Science) Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the CUTN Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download CUTN Faculty Resource Person (Science & Social Science) Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: CUTN Faculty Resource Person (Science & Social Science) Vacancy Details 2026
CUTN Faculty Resource Person (Science & Social Science) Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: PG / M.A. degree with minimum 60% of marks in any discipline of Science / Social Sciences disciplines. UPSC / TNPSC Group 1 (Prelims or Mains) qualified after 2015. Preferable: Teaching Experience in any Civil Services Coaching Institute of repute. Ability to teach CSAT (Quantitative Aptitude, Reasoning, Reading comprehension), General Science, Ethics, Law, History, Geography, Economics and other topics for Preliminary and Mains exam of UPSC / TNPSC Group 1.

content_sections.heading: CUTN Faculty Resource Person (Science & Social Science) Salary 2026
CUTN Faculty Resource Person (Science & Social Science) Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
CUTN Faculty Resource Person (Science & Social Science) Selection Process 2026
Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for CUTN Faculty Resource Person (Science & Social Science) Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

content_sections.heading: CUTN Faculty Resource Person (Science & Social Science) Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for CUTN Faculty Resource Person recruitment?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview is scheduled for 15th July 2026. Candidates should ensure they reach the venue on time with all necessary documents.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Faculty Resource Person post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a PG / M.A. degree with a minimum of 60% marks in any Science or Social Sciences discipline, and have qualified UPSC / TNPSC Group 1 (Prelims or Mains) after 2015.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Faculty Resource Person position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 80,000 per month.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q5. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The mode of application is Walk-in. Candidates need to attend the interview directly at the specified venue and time.

faq.question: Q6. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: You should carry all original documents, self-attested photocopies of educational certificates, ID proof, and any other relevant documents as mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q7. Where is the walk-in interview scheduled to be held?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held at Central University of Tamil Nadu, Thiruvarur, Tamil Nadu - 610005.

faq.question: Q8. Are there any age relaxations applicable for this post?
faq.answer: The official notification does not specify any age limits or relaxations. It is advisable to check the detailed notification for any such information.

faq.question: Q9. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the post of Faculty Resource Person (Science & Social Science).

faq.question: Q10. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process will be based on a Walk-In-Interview.
